nasb.text: When I consider Your heavens, the work of Your fingers, The moon and the stars, which You have ordained;

esv.text: When I look at your heavens, the work of your fingers, the moon and the stars, which you have set in place,

cnv.text: 我觀看你手所造的天， 和你所安放的月亮和星星。

ccb.text: 我观看你指头创造的穹苍和你摆列的月亮星辰，

csbs.text: 我观看你手指所造的天， 并你所安设的月亮星宿，
